place: Taling Ngam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Hillside Villa with Five-Islands Views, Four Bedrooms, Taling Ngam
note: Minimum stay 30 nights · breakfast & airport transfers included
blurb: A four-bedroom hillside villa nestled in lush canopy above Koh Samui’s Taling Ngam, with unparalleled views of the Five Islands and the Gulf beyond. A 25-metre infinity-edge pool and an expansive terrace, four en-suite bedrooms and a private chef — offered for long stays of 30 nights or more.
detail:
Sun, sea and serenity. Set within a lush canopy on a magnificent Taling Ngam hillside, this villa promises seclusion and tranquillity, with uninterrupted views of the Five Islands and the horizon beyond from the moment you step in.

Days unfold around a 25-metre infinity-edge pool and expansive terrace — a sunbed and a cocktail as the blue sky meets azure water. Inside, the cool, salt-tinged breeze flows through open-plan spaces and rooms strategically angled toward the tropical landscaping and the sea.

The interior is a timeless Thai take on contemporary coastal living: a natural palette of granite, teak and pebble-wash drawn from the surroundings, across a two-storey villa of effortless elegance. Four en-suite bedrooms look out to soothing sea or garden views, and a fully-equipped kitchen with a Nespresso machine sits ready for the days you cook yourself.

A private chef is on hand to tailor a menu to your tastes, with sunset barbecues by arrangement; in-villa spa and massage, a gym, and sailing excursions can all be organised. Complimentary WiFi and round-trip airport transfers, JBL speakers and a Smart TV with streaming round out an easy, fully-staffed stay. Available for stays of 30 nights and longer.

features.l: Four en-suite bedrooms · sea or garden views
